name: Apple-Style UI
description: A minimalist, premium UI in the Apple design language: generous whitespace, a refined neutral palette with a single system accent, SF-like type hierarchy, soft rounded corners, subtle depth via layered translucency, and precise micro-interactions. Calm, confident, legible.

requiredElements.name: neutral-palette
requiredElements.description: A refined neutral palette (whites/grays/near-black) with a single restrained system accent color.

requiredElements.name: type-hierarchy
requiredElements.description: A clear type hierarchy with large, semibold display headings and regular body; tight letter-spacing on headings.

requiredElements.name: generous-whitespace
requiredElements.description: Generous, consistent whitespace; content is not crowded.

requiredElements.name: rounded-corners
requiredElements.description: Soft, consistent rounded corners on cards/buttons/inputs (consistent radius scale).

requiredElements.name: subtle-depth
requiredElements.description: Depth conveyed subtly via soft shadows or translucency, not heavy borders or harsh gradients.

requiredElements.name: micro-interactions
requiredElements.description: Subtle, precise micro-interactions (smooth ease, small transform/opacity changes) on hover/press.

optionalElements.name: translucency
optionalElements.description: A frosted-glass translucent layer (backdrop-filter blur) for bars/sheets.

optionalElements.name: large-hero
optionalElements.description: A large product hero with centered headline and single CTA.

optionalElements.name: sf-symbols
optionalElements.description: Consistent line-icon set (SF Symbols style) with uniform stroke weight.

qualityRules.description: Restraint over decoration; one focal point per view.
Display headings carry the hierarchy via size/weight, not color.
Corner radius follows one scale across components.
Shadow tokens consistent; no ad-hoc shadow values.
Body text >=16px, line-height >=1.5, high contrast on light/dark.
Micro-interactions use ease-out/ease-in-out, never linear; duration 200-350ms.
Semantic landmarks and proper heading order.
Layout adapts with the viewport; fluid type/spacing.

antiPatterns.description: Crowded content and small spacing breaks the calm premium feel.
Hard 1px borders everywhere reads as cheap; prefer subtle depth.
Linear easing on interactions feels mechanical, not premium.
Animating regardless of prefers-reduced-motion harms accessibility.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add a frosted translucent bar/sheet for layered depth.
Tighten heading letter-spacing and increase display size for stronger hierarchy.

exampleOutputs.label: Premium card with subtle depth
exampleOutputs.snippet:
Design Tokens

A single source of truth for color, radius, and shadow.

references.title: Apple Human Interface Guidelines — Visual Design
